demos.text: You'll see a bit more complexity here than you did in the controller for articles. That's a side-effect of the nesting that you've set up. Each request for a comment has to keep track of the article to which the comment is attached, thus the initial call to the find method of the Article model to get the article in question.
demos.reasoning: The passage has a natural instructional tone, concrete context, and slightly informal phrasing (“You'll see a bit more complexity” and “in question”) characteristic of human-written technical documentation. It does not show strong signs of templated or machine-generated prose.

demos.text: Of course, as you develop out your DAGs they are going to get increasingly complex, so we provide a few ways to modify these DAG views to make them easier to understand.

fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
